description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a rectangular, blocky slide finished in a muted blue-gray color. The grip is brown with a textured, ribbed pattern and is secured by two visible screws, suggesting a wooden or polymer material. The trigger guard is angular and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is integrated into the slide, with no visible threading or compensator, and the overall design is reminiscent of classic service pistols. The slide features subtle linear engravings near the rear, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise utilitarian appearance. The magazine base is slightly beveled and flush with the grip, lacking any pronounced extension or finger rest.
description: A blocky, blue-gray semi-automatic handgun with a ribbed brown grip and subtle slide engravings. The design is utilitarian with a robust trigger guard and a flush magazine base.
description_view_0: The left side of the handgun shows the ribbed brown grip, two securing screws, and subtle slide engravings near the rear.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the rectangular slide and the symmetry of the handgun, with minimal detail visible on the grip or trigger guard.
description_view_2: The right side mirrors the left, displaying the ribbed grip, screws, and slide engravings, with the ejection port area subtly indicated.
description_view_3: The front view shows the muzzle opening and the width of the slide, with the trigger guard and grip only partially visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is brown with a ribbed, vertically grooved texture, providing enhanced traction and a secure hold. It is contoured to fit the hand comfortably and is attached with two visible screws, suggesting a replaceable panel design. The material appears to be either wood or polymer, with a matte finish and no visible logos or finger grooves. The grip's shape is slightly flared at the base for improved ergonomics.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is angular and robust, with a squared-off front and a thick profile. It is generously sized, allowing for easy finger access, and features no visible undercuts or texturing. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and durability over decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is integrated within the rectangular slide and appears to be of standard length, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior is smooth and finished in the same blue-gray color as the slide, with no additional markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features subtle linear engravings near the rear, likely for improved grip during slide manipulation. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations present on the exterior.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip and slightly beveled, lacking any extension, finger rest, or flaring. It is simple and utilitarian, with no visible logos or texturing.
